title: HYPOTHESIS_REGISTERED payload
description: Emitted on successful Hypothesis synthesis. Carries the full Hypothesis artifact plus denormalized governance fields required for ledger-only reconstructability (Invariant 4).

hypothesis.description: The full v2 Hypothesis artifact. Must validate against shared/artifact-contracts/v2/Hypothesis.schema.json.

governing_ceiling.description: The max_synthesis_depth value that governed this synthesis under chain-minimum attribution. Denormalized so reconstruction does not require re-walking the agent registry.

binding_agent_id.description: Agent whose max_synthesis_depth was the minimum in the chain union {source_agent} ∪ upstream-chain-agents, and therefore governs. Invariant 2 transparency.

bme_score_source.description: Sprint-3 decision (e-revised): composite_upstream_bme_score is number-required on the HEAD-locked Hypothesis schema. Sprint-3 accepts caller-supplied placeholders; Sprint-4 BME attribution populates computed values. This field marks which source produced the value so reconstruction can distinguish the two without touching the artifact schema.
